en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO THE GITTITH. A PSALM OF DAVID. O LORD, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth! You have set your glory above the heavens.
zh: 耶和華我們的主啊！ 你的名在全地是多麼威嚴， 你把你的榮美彰顯在天上。

en: Out of the mouth of babes and infants, you have established strength because of your foes, to still the enemy and the avenger.
zh: 因你仇敵的緣故， 你從小孩和嬰兒的口中， 得著了讚美 ， 使仇敵和報仇的無話可說。

en: When I look at your heavens, the work of your fingers, the moon and the stars, which you have set in place,
zh: 我觀看你手所造的天， 和你所安放的月亮和星星。

en: what is man that you are mindful of him, and the son of man that you care for him?
zh: 啊！人算甚麼，你竟記念他？ 世人算甚麼，你竟眷顧他？

en: Yet you have made him a little lower than the heavenly beings and crowned him with glory and honor.
zh: 你使他比天使 低微一點， 卻賜給他榮耀尊貴作冠冕。

en: You have given him dominion over the works of your hands; you have put all things under his feet,
zh: 你叫他管理你手所造的， 把萬物都放在他的腳下，

en: all sheep and oxen, and also the beasts of the field,
zh: 就是所有的牛羊、 田間的走獸、

en: the birds of the heavens, and the fish of the sea, whatever passes along the paths of the seas.
zh: 空中的飛鳥、海裡的魚， 和海裡游行的水族。

en: O LORD, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth!
zh: 耶和華我們的主啊！ 你的名在全地是多麼威嚴。
